demo.title: blueagent.sh
demo.code:
# Pre-transaction safety check ($0.05)
bankr prompt "Use BlueAgent risk-gate to vet 'approve unlimited USDC to 0xRouter'"

# Honeypot / rug detection on a Base token ($0.05)
bankr prompt "Run BlueAgent honeypot-check on 0xTOKEN"

# Quantum vulnerability score for your wallet ($1.50)
bankr prompt "Run BlueAgent quantum-premium on my wallet"

# Circuit breaker decision for an autonomous agent ($0.50)
bankr prompt "BlueAgent circuit-breaker — agent took 3 consecutive losses, $340 down"

# Deep due diligence on a project ($0.35)
bankr prompt "BlueAgent deep-analysis on \$BRETT"

setup: Configure wallet: `blueagent setup` (loads private key for x402 payments)
Or install MCP for Claude Code: `npx @blueagent/skill install --claude`
Fund a Base wallet with USDC for pay-per-call requests (no account/API key needed)
